content.full_text:
June 23, 2010

Fred Buckingham
739 Groveland Court
Merced, CA 95340

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-072

Dear Mr. Buckingham:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on June 15, 2010.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Dixie Howard
Assistant Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division

DH:jgl
